title: Chorios systems
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Chorios}}
This group of [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] included several systems with the name Chorios. It included the [[Brachnis Chorios system/Legends|Brachnis Chorios system]], the [[Chorios system|Nam Chorios system]], the [[Pedducis Chorios system/Legends|Pedducis Chorios system]] and the [[Till Chorios system/Legends|Till Chorios system]]. Most of the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of these systems were lifeless and barren, with the scarce inhabitants collectively known as Chorians.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Planet of Twilight (abridged audiobook)|''Planet of Twilight'' abridged audiobook]]
